mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.user_id, l.type, l.operate, l.status, l.ip_address, l.details, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(l.period) * 1000 as period, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(l.operation_time) * 1000 as operate_time, CASE WHEN l.type = 0 THEN ar.username WHEN l.type = 1 THEN rr.username ELSE NULL END as username FROM log l LEFT JOIN admin_registration ar ON l.user_id = ar.id AND l.type = 0 LEFT JOIN repairman_registration rr ON l.user_id = rr.id AND l.type = 1
AND ( (l.type = 0) OR (l.type = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM repairman r WHERE r.id = l.user_id AND r.area_id = #{areaId} )) )
AND l.type = #{type}
AND l.status = #{status}
AND l.operation_time >= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{operationTimeMin} / 1000)
AND l.operation_time <= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{operationTimeMax} / 1000)
ORDER BY l.operation_time DESC

choose.when: SELECT username FROM admin_registration WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT username FROM repairman_registration WHERE id = #{userId}

mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.user_id, l.type, l.operate, l.status, l.ip_address, l.details, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(l.period) * 1000 as period, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(l.operation_time) * 1000 as operate_time, CASE WHEN l.type = 0 THEN ar.username WHEN l.type = 1 THEN rr.username ELSE NULL END as username FROM log l LEFT JOIN admin_registration ar ON l.user_id = ar.id AND l.type = 0 LEFT JOIN repairman_registration rr ON l.user_id = rr.id AND l.type = 1 WHERE l.id = #{id}
